title: Gooey Romantic Herbal Cherry Stir-fry
description: A gooey and romantic vegan-friendly Jamaican dish featuring cherry, marinated with herbs and spices for added flavor.
instructions: Combine cherry tomatoes with olive oil, red pepper flakes, balsamic vinegar, maple syrup, chili garlic paste, ground flaxseed, dijon mustard, thyme leaves, and rosemary sprigs in a mixing bowl. Season with salt and pepper.
Stir until the cherry tomatoes are evenly coated.
Transfer the mixture to an oven-safe baking dish. Bake for 20 minutes.
In another pan, sauté minced garlic over medium heat for about 1 minute.
Add a splash of water or more balsamic vinegar if needed to deglaze the pan and mix with cherry tomato sauce.
Mix well until the mixture thickens slightly. The sauce should be creamy and bubbly on top.
Pour the sauce over the baked cherry tomatoes, ensuring they are evenly coated. Return to oven for another 10 minutes or until it reaches your desired consistency.
Serve hot as a vegan-friendly dinner dish.
